text: Speed restriction signs may, but need not, be erected upon any highway other than a state highway at the entrance thereof into a business or residence district unless required in this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 2. Traffic Signs, Signals, and Markings [21350 - 21468]
#### Article 1. Erection and Maintenance [21350 - 21376]
##### § 21357

Speed restriction signs may, but need not, be erected upon any highway other than a state highway at the entrance thereof into a business or residence district unless required in this chapter.

*(Amended by Stats. 1959, Ch. 11.)*
